tasks.label: 🐳 GPU Container: Start & Prepare
tasks.command: docker-compose up -d && echo '✅ Container running.' && echo '🔧 Starting symlink watcher (Antigravity v1.16.5 workaround)...' && docker exec -d tfm_education_ai_analytics-tfm-gpu-1 bash -c 'SERVER_DIR="$HOME/.antigravity-server/bin"; mkdir -p "$SERVER_DIR"; for i in $(seq 1 1200); do for dir in "$SERVER_DIR"/*-*; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then commit="${dir##*-}"; [ ! -e "$SERVER_DIR/$commit" ] && ln -s "$dir" "$SERVER_DIR/$commit" 2>/dev/null && echo "Symlink created for $commit"; fi; done; sleep 0.1; done' && echo '🔗 Ready! Use Ctrl+Shift+P → Dev Containers: Attach to Running Container'

tasks.label: 🔄 GPU Container: Rebuild
tasks.command: docker-compose down --rmi all && docker-compose build --no-cache && docker-compose up -d && echo '✅ Rebuilt!' && echo '🔧 Starting symlink watcher...' && docker exec -d tfm_education_ai_analytics-tfm-gpu-1 bash -c 'SERVER_DIR="$HOME/.antigravity-server/bin"; mkdir -p "$SERVER_DIR"; for i in $(seq 1 1200); do for dir in "$SERVER_DIR"/*-*; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then commit="${dir##*-}"; [ ! -e "$SERVER_DIR/$commit" ] && ln -s "$dir" "$SERVER_DIR/$commit" 2>/dev/null && echo "Symlink created for $commit"; fi; done; sleep 0.1; done' && echo '🔗 Ready! Use Ctrl+Shift+P → Dev Containers: Attach to Running Container'

tasks.label: 📊 GPU Container: Status
tasks.command: docker-compose ps && echo '---' && docker exec tfm_education_ai_analytics-tfm-gpu-1 nvidia-smi 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️ Container not running'
